etymology.description: 戌(戌) (xū, "ninth month") as sound + 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") as meaning -> phonetic use
etymology.interpretation: The character 烕 combines the phonetic element 戌, which resembles a military insignia associated with the ninth month, with the semantic element 火, representing fire. This suggests a connection to activities involving fire during that time or a phonetic borrowing for related meanings.
